column1: Adding NAV to a 2015 w/Sync 2 only that doesn't currently have it

column3: Download Sync 3.8 at the link to the right and extract contents to a blank FAT-32 formatted usb drive and install.
Download NAV update at link to the right and extract contents to a blank FAT-32 formatted usb drive and install.

In FORScan, go to programming screen for APIM and change 7D0-01-02 to: x4xx xxxx xxxx to enable NAV (just write the "4" in the appropriate spot and ignore any message about incorrect checksum and click continue)
Download the NaviPatch file on the right and copy to a blank, FAT-32 formatted usb drive

Insert usb drive with NaviPatch.png file into truck's usb port and go into Settings, Display, Edit Wallpaper.  Press "Add", press "USB Disk", select NaviPatch.png and in the image preview window press "Unlock"

Optional: Backup your ACM Module in FORScan so you don't lose your presets that the following step will erase.  In ACM Programming screen, click "save all" button at the bottom and name it.  After step 6, return to this screen and click "load all" button at the bottom, click your saved ACM file, then click "write all" button at the bottom and your presets should be restored.
Perform a master reset to factory default on screen
Purchase and load navigation maps from dealer or "obtain" from other sources
** Note: if you do any further updates to Sync in the future that come out, you may lose your NAV and this procedure may not work at that time
